query: is this package ready to publish?
check the package.json has everything needed before release
publish with provenance from the CI pipeline
only push this to the registry if the version isn't already up there
rationale: idempotent publish, buried in casual phrasing

query: bump this package to 2.0.0 and update dependents
rationale: adjacent release step, owned by versioning-guide

install the project dependencies with npm install

query: ship this package to the registry and skip it if already published
validate publish-readiness of these packages before the release job
bump every dependent package and tag the release version
